items.name: White 2000s Washed Out Suede Boots
items.description:
Step into the past with a modern twist in these cute silk boots, inspired by the bold fashion of the 2000s! With their luxe, silky texture and chic design, these boots bring a touch of glamour and nostalgia to any look. Perfect for adding a pop of Y2K flair, they’re versatile enough to dress up any outfit, whether you're going for playful or polished. Show off your style with these effortlessly cool boots that take you straight back to the iconic fashion of the early 2000s!

items.name: Bunny Bliss Pierced Beanie
items.description:
Hop into style with the Bunny Bliss Pierced Beanie, a playful and edgy twist on a classic accessory. This cozy beanie features adorable bunny ears that add a whimsical touch to your look, while the surrounding piercings deliver a bold, modern edge. Crafted from high-quality, soft fabric, it ensures both comfort and standout style. Perfect for adding a unique flair to your Roblox avatar or making a statement in any casual outfit, the Bunny Bliss Pierced Beanie combines fun and fashion in one irresistible package. Embrace the ultimate fusion of cute and cool with this must-have beanie.

items.name: Black 2000s Washed Out Suede Boots
items.description:
Step into the past with a modern twist in these cute silk boots, inspired by the bold fashion of the 2000s! With their luxe, silky texture and chic design, these boots bring a touch of glamour and nostalgia to any look. Perfect for adding a pop of Y2K flair, they’re versatile enough to dress up any outfit, whether you're going for playful or polished. Show off your style with these effortlessly cool boots that take you straight back to the iconic fashion of the early 2000s!

Made for it-girl body (Elevated) :


Join Fashion Diaries for recolors and many more items! <3 :

items.name: Midnight Flow Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🖤 Elegant • Dramatic • Timeless
This coat drapes like a story — a flowing black silhouette that feels both mysterious and graceful. Its long cut moves naturally, almost like it’s alive with every step, while the subtle worn edges give it depth and character. Sleek leather-like textures add a modern touch, making it perfect for avatars who want to stand out with quiet confidence.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
🖤 Long, flowing design for dramatic movement
✨ PBR textures that give the fabric a realistic sheen
🧵 Detailed stitching & natural folds for authenticity
🌌 A look that works for fantasy, urban, or cinematic roleplay
🎮 Versatile style — cool, mysterious, but never harsh
🔍 Keywords: black coat, long trench coat, cinematic outfit, stylish fashion, mysterious robe, Roblox

items.name: 🎀「Marshmallow Duffle Coat [PBR]」
items.description:
A sweet pastel duffle coat that feels as soft as a marshmallow.
Its rosy pink hue and classic toggle buttons bring a playful charm to winter outfits, while the hood keeps you warm and ready for chilly adventures.
✨ Features
Fluffy pink coat with toggle closures
Cute and cozy pastel winter style
Great for casual, kawaii, or cozy looks
PBR textures for soft fabric realism
🔍 Keywords: pastel coat, duffle coat, cute, cozy, kawaii, winter
